title: The Creatio
body:
Modpack is designed for people who would like to refresh the vanilla game. You can play alone or with friends(emotecraft and voicechat are already here), for online play read the end of the description.

It is based on Create mod with many addons, developing the technical direction, but you also can  be a mage, explore the world, defeat bosses or clean up dungeons.

**The main technical mods are:**
-  Create
-  Create: Big cannons
-  Create: New Age
-  Create: The factory must grow
-  Refined storage
-  Immersive Aircraft
  
**The main magic mods are:**
-  Iron's spells and spellbooks
-  Enigmatic legacy
-  L_Ender's Cataclysm
-  Relics
- Stalwart Dungeons
